Class WindowUtil

java.lang.Object
com.risk.services.Util.WindowUtil
public class WindowUtil extends Object
This class provides all the game utilities as to exit window,enable and disable button.
Author:
Palash Jain

    Description

    checkCheckBoxes(javafx.scene.control.CheckBox... checkBoxes)
    This method helps to provide checkboxes using Java FXML
    static javafx.scene.control.TitledPane
    createNewPane(Continent continent)
    This method helps to create a new pane to include the continents and its countries and show the ownership of that particular country.
    static void
    disableButtonControl(javafx.scene.control.Control... controls)
    This method helps to disable button in the pane.
    static void
    disablePane(javafx.scene.layout.Pane pane)
    This method is used to disable a complete pane.
    static void
    enableButtonControl(javafx.scene.control.Control... controls)
    This method helps to enable button in the pane.
    static void
    enablePane(javafx.scene.layout.Pane pane)
    This method is used to enable a complete pane.

  • Method Details

    • exitWindow

      public static void exitWindow(javafx.scene.control.Button button)
      This method is used to close the window.
      Parameters:
      button - button

    • disablePane

      public static void disablePane(javafx.scene.layout.Pane pane)
      This method is used to disable a complete pane.
      Parameters:
      pane - window

    • enablePane

      public static void enablePane(javafx.scene.layout.Pane pane)
      This method is used to enable a complete pane.
      Parameters:
      pane - window

    • popUpWindow

      public static void popUpWindow(String head, String title, String information)
      This method provides a warning window with a message.
      Parameters:
      head - Head of the window
      title - Title of the window
      information - warning message

    • hideButtonControl

      public static void hideButtonControl(javafx.scene.control.Control... controls)
      This method helps to hide a button in the pane.
      Parameters:
      controls - Any number of inputs

    • disableButtonControl

      public static void disableButtonControl(javafx.scene.control.Control... controls)
      This method helps to disable button in the pane.
      Parameters:
      controls - Any number of inputs

    • enableButtonControl

      public static void enableButtonControl(javafx.scene.control.Control... controls)
      This method helps to enable button in the pane.
      Parameters:
      controls - Any number of inputs

    • showCheckBox

      public static void showCheckBox(javafx.scene.control.Control... controls)
      Method for making checkbox visible.
      Parameters:
      controls - any number of checkboxes

    • createNewPane

      public static javafx.scene.control.TitledPane createNewPane(Continent continent)
      This method helps to create a new pane to include the continents and its countries and show the ownership of that particular country.
      Parameters:
      continent - Continent Object
      Returns:
      pane

    • showFileChooser

      public static File showFileChooser()
      This method helps to select a map file by providing its extension
      Returns:
      Selected file

    • unCheckBoxes

      public static void unCheckBoxes(javafx.scene.control.CheckBox... checkBoxes)
      This method helps to provide checkboxes using Java FXML
      Parameters:
      checkBoxes - checkBoxes

      public static void checkCheckBoxes(javafx.scene.control.CheckBox... checkBoxes)
      This method helps to provide checkboxes using Java FXML
      Parameters:
      checkBoxes - checkBoxes

      public static void selectVisibleDice(javafx.scene.control.Control... controls)
      Method to select dice
      Parameters:
      controls - any number of controls

    • userInput

      public static String userInput()
      This method helps in taking user input by providing a input box
